scopeSync.summary: Scoped active work to 영역 03 Schedule Smart Focus: detail interaction focus hook, dimmed/inert schedule operations and calendar zones, outside-tap/back-release handling, and glass loading skeleton styling.

targetedTest.summary: 70 tests passed, including confirmed schedule detail rendering plus smart focus activation from tactics/comments, dimmed pointer-blocked calendar/ops zones, inert aria state, and outside release.

lint.summary: ESLint passed as part of baseline verification.

typecheck.summary: TypeScript passed for useSmartFocus, ScheduleTab inert props, pointer handlers, and UI test changes.

baseline.summary: Harness validation, lint, typecheck, and full Vitest suite passed: 19 test files passed, 1 skipped; 230 tests passed, 15 skipped.

build.summary: Production build passed with build-time public Supabase env.

retrospective.issuesObserved: ScheduleTab is large, so the focus state machine was kept in a small hook and wired through existing SelectedMatchPanel boundaries rather than adding more local interaction state.
retrospective.missedEvidence: Manual mobile browser back verification was not run; deterministic tests cover the visible focus contracts while the hook owns the history pop release path.
retrospective.harnessImprovementProposal: Consider a focused ScheduleTab interaction fixture that can exercise browser history and pointer capture without full store setup.
retrospective.reason: The smart focus behavior is section-specific interaction work and does not require a durable harness rule promotion.
